use_cases: Landing page hero sections for SaaS products and services
Interactive product showcases with immersive gradient backgrounds
Marketing pages that need engaging visual effects to capture attention
Creative portfolios and personal websites with artistic appeal
E-commerce product launch pages with memorable first impressions
ai_summary: A visually striking hero section component featuring an interactive 3D liquid gradient background powered by Three.js. The component responds to mouse/touch movements creating flowing, organic animations, and includes customizable title text and a CTA button with pause/play functionality for the animation.
